title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Daikin India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Daikin India
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India:
Daikin India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India!
